rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Write output dependency contracts as guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs in type scope
generic_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use assign for non-output features or undeclared variables in implementation scope
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
